source_section.title_label_raw: Built Form and Siting Requirements within the PCF and RPK Zones Applicability

sections.title_label_raw: Siting Requirements within the PCF and RPK Zones Applicability

provisions.heading_context_raw: Siting Requirements within the PCF and RPK Zones Applicability
provisions.text: With the exception of main buildings within a heritage conservation district, any main building erected, constructed, reconstructed, altered, or located, or an addition to any main building, within a PCF or RPK zone shall meet the built form and siting requirements of this Chapter. Maximum Building Height

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed
provisions.text: Subject to Section 103 and Part X, any main building shall not exceed the maximum required building height specified on Schedule 15. Minimum Front or Flanking Setbacks

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 307(2), any portion of a main building,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 307(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 307(2), any portion of a main building, either above or below grade, shall have a minimum required front or flanking setback as specified on Schedule 18.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 307(2), any portion of a main building,
provisions.text: If a minimum required front or flanking setback has not been specified on Schedule 18, the minimum required front or flanking setback shall be 3.0 metres. Side Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 308(2), the minimum required side

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 308(2), the minimum required side
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 308(2), the minimum required side setback for any main building shall be 2.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 308(2), the minimum required side
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum side setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any side yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 308(2), the minimum required side
provisions.text: There is no maximum required side setback. Rear Setback Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 309(2), the minimum required rear

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 309(2), the minimum required rear
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 309(2), the minimum required rear setback for any main building shall be 2.5 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 309(2), the minimum required rear
provisions.text: Underground parking structures are not required to have a minimum rear setback, providing they do not protrude more than 0.6 metre above the average finished grade in any rear yard. Maximum Lot Coverage

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 310(2), the maximum required lot

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 310(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 310(2), the maximum required lot coverage shall be 40%.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 310(2), the maximum required lot
provisions.text: One accessory structure per lot, which has a footprint that is no greater than 20.0 square metres, shall be exempted from the maximum required lot coverage calculation. Minimum Separation Distances

sections.title_label_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in
provisions.text: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in Subsection 89(3), a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between main buildings.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Where more than one main building is permitted on a lot in
provisions.text: Where more than one portion of a main building protrudes above grade, a minimum required separation distance of 4.0 metres shall be provided between the above grade portions. Accessory Structures and Shipping Containers

sections.title_label_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the
provisions.text: Accessory structures and shipping containers shall meet the requirements of Part V, Chapter 19.
